The First Post

The First Post
by Charbel Daher Jun 27, 2026
1 min read

Hello, and welcome to my law blog.

At the time of writing this, I am still a junior in high school. I started this blog to serve two purposes,

  1. to better my legal knowledge in preparation for the very forthcoming law school (in ~7 years), and
  2. to flex on my non-blog-having friends.

As this blog progresses, I would like to restate that this blog is in no way shape or form legal advice. If you are viewing anything here before 2034, I am probably still a student, and even afterwards, if I hopefully become a laywer, this will still not constitute any form of legal advice.

Nevertheless, have fun as I discover the legal world, step by step.
